account_id.description: Specifies the AWS account ID to grant launch permissions for the AMI. Must be a valid 12-digit account number.

group.description: Specifies the user group to grant launch permissions, such as "all" for public access.

image_id.description: Specifies the ID of the Amazon Machine Image (AMI) to which launch permissions will be added.

organization_arn.description: Specifies the ARN of the organization to grant launch permissions for the AMI. Must be a valid organization ARN.

organizational_unit_arn.description: ARN of the organizational unit to grant launch permissions, specifying the target organizational unit within AWS Organizations.
